success_factors: Workflow completed all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize) with overall status=success.
Import-based adapter strategy was feasible (import_feasibility=0.91) and aligned with low intrusiveness risk.
Generated MCP plugin started healthy over stdio and passed plugin-level checks.
Repository already has strong domain structure and extensive upstream tests, which improved discoverability of stable integration points.
failure_reasons: Original project test result is marked failed/unknown despite reported 100% coverage metadata, indicating test-execution telemetry inconsistency rather than confirmed code failure.
DeepWiki analysis failed, reducing external architectural/context enrichment.

node_performance.generation_time: Completed successfully; plugin scaffold and 10 endpoints produced, though generation metrics (LOC/size/tool count) are inconsistent with file list.
node_performance.test_time: Plugin run/health checks passed; original project tests were not reliably executed/recorded (metadata conflict), so end-to-end validation depth is limited.
